summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The ARS Core Equity Portfolio ETF (ACEP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed companies with above-average dividend yield. The ETF uses fundamental research to assess both the enterprise value and expected growth value of a company. ACEP was launched on Nov 20, 2025 and is issued by ARS.

holdings.infoBox: ACEP is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 4.38%, First American Government Obligations Fund at 4.33%, Broadcom at 4.28%, Parker-Hannifin at 3.93%, and Seagate Technology Holdings at 3.81%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
